title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. flexile
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. flexile, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to lower fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Hawkweed can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it's often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
